stateGate.headline: What state is the property in?
stateGate.offStateExitCopy: We're not funding deals in your state right now. Drop your email and we'll let you know when we open it up.

q1PropertyType.headline: What kind of property is it?
q1PropertyType.otherKickoutCopy: Modular, mobile, or 5+ acres? We don't lend on those. Drop your email and we'll let you know when we have options.

q2PropertyValue.headline: What's it worth today?
q2PropertyValue.minTooltip: Min property value: $200K. Anything smaller and the math doesn't work.
q2PropertyValue.helperHint: Most investors in your state are $300K-$500K

q3LoanBalance.headline: What do you still owe on it?
q3LoanBalance.freeAndClearCopy: Own it free and clear? Drag to $0.

q4MonthlyRent.headline: What does it rent for per month?

q5Fico.headline: Roughly, where's your credit score?
q5Fico.microcopy: This is an estimate only, no credit is being pulled.
q5Fico.below620KickoutCopy: We can sometimes help below 620 with a lower cash-out amount. Drop your info and our team will reach out personally.

reveal.headline: Your Cash Out Estimate
reveal.cashLineLabel: cash in your pocket at close
reveal.cashFlowLineLabel: new cash flow after the loan
reveal.timelineLine: ~20 business days from yes to wired
reveal.asterisk: That is an estimate to be confirmed. Numbers vary off of credit, loan amount, and property taxes.
reveal.ctaLabel: Get an exact quote. Firm up your numbers.
reveal.ctaSubline: This is what we believe you should be eligible for. If you want to get a real quote, tell us more.

contact.headline: Where should we send your locked Cash Card?
contact.microcopy: A real loan officer from our team will text you within 2 business hours with your locked numbers. No dialer. No robocalls. No spam.
